changeSet.author: celine
changeSet.comment: Enforce that each user can own at most one PROFILE_PICTURE image while allowing any number of other image types.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE images ADD COLUMN profile_picture_slot TINYINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( CASE WHEN image_type = 'PROFILE_PICTURE' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END ) STORED, ADD UNIQUE INDEX uk_images_profile_picture_owner (uploaded_by, profile_picture_slot);
